reviews.review_title: Play is great courses are good
reviews.review_description: The game is great, however they need to update the way online multiplayer is done because there is never anybody online to play with. My suggestion is make it  so your online lobby you create stay open while you play single player and wait for other online players join then have a notification to let you know others have joined your open lobby. That would promote more players to play online . Right now i create a lobby and have to sit there doing nothing but waiting long petiods of time wasted doing nothing but waiting for players.

reviews.review_title: Best VR disc golf game, hands down
reviews.review_description:
Awesome game with the best disc physics you can find. It is much harder than the mobile version where you can carefully set your power and angle, making grinding for discs a lot tougher.

My only gripe is I struggle to consistently get 100% power on back hand throws. Maybe lower the threshold to get to 100%, or let us set a power range before we throw. Forehand feels perfect. 

Hopefully the putting practice mode gets added as well.

reviews.review_title: Best disc game for the price...however
reviews.review_description: So while im a big fan of the fact that the game is free. The fact that youre given 4 free maps with 15-16 possible discs to unlock. However the UI is clunky sometimes the game just won't respond forcing you to either restart the course or quit the game. The multiplayer is horrendous with a very clunky invite and private hosting options. Though due to this being connected to Horizon worlds im certain this is mostly a beta for a $15-$20 game down the line.

I’ve tried a handful of the available VR disc golf games and DGV by far feels the best to play. This game was released on Steam previously and the project was abandoned with little to no updates. I’m hopeful with the move to the Meta platform and the new launch, this version will receive more regular updates to bring it closer to the content available in the mobile version.

developer_response.body: Thank you! Using the Meta platform is definitely a game changer that also adds a more social aspect to the game that we hope players will enjoy. :)

reviews.review_description:
Tl;Dr: If you've never played disc golf before and you're curious what it's like, or if you play irl disc golf casually, you'll probably enjoy this a lot.

I've been playing irl disc golf for more than 10 years and I played disc golf valley on my phone for about 3 years.

As a VR port of disc golf valley, this is a pretty good game. Putts, rollers, scrambles and forehands feel great and pretty realistic. I hope this game is continually developed with improved physics and play style as well as more content being added. This is a great gateway to disc golf and disc golf culture.

That being said, if you are a long time veteran irl disc golf player, you might find this game ultimately frustrating.

Any time you try to release a disc with high amounts of spin and force, getting your release angle and timing just right is very hard. And even if you whip the controller with a lot of force, this does not make the disc go further. Rather, it's like the game "caps" the speed you can throw a disc at.

Also, say you're throwing an upshot, not so hard with a little spin and intending to glide, you will most likely release too high and the disc will fly as it's nose up and come crashing to the ground rather than flying low and smooth as you intended. This is because the game has two throwing "modes".

You can drive a disc or putt a disc (and your putt is forced into a floating crashing style putt no matter how you release it). As a long time disc golfer with a very strong style of play, I get somewhat irked that I can't seem to get my discs to do what I think they should.

If I have the time and the weather is good, nothing beats throwing down at the park. But for a nasty day or when time is tight, Disc Golf Valley VR is a lot of fun.

I’ve been playing Disc Golf for nine years and I’ve tried two other VR DG games and this one is hands-down the best! Graphics are great, love the scenery, and cannot wait for more courses to get added. At the time of this review I’ve only been playing a couple days. I would also love to see a putting/practice basket 

What works 

• Best disc golf physics on Quest
• Realistic forehand/backhand flight behavior
• Sense of real disc selection and bag building

What needs improvement imo

• Option to use grip button to release instead of trigger hold
• Fix for throw not registering when release timing is slightly off
• put spin smoothing for low-speed throws to prevent tumbling when putting
• Better explanation in-game that stars unlock discs
• Minor input sensitivity / dead-zone tuning

Cannot wait to see this game evolve!

As a big fan of disc golf and Latitude 64 discs, I’m thrilled to see it’s finally available for Meta Quest! I gave it a shot today, and it was a blast! I’d recommend it to any disc golf enthusiast for those rainy days when you can’t make it to the real course! 🥏⛳️🤘🏻

developer_response.body: Very glad you enjoy the game! Fuse is king :)

reviews.review_description: One of my favorite disc golf games on iOS is a delight to play now in VR. I'm looking forward to this developer's release of Disc Golf Masters, but in the meantime Disc Golf Valley in VR will be a lot of fun.

Hands down best disc golf VR game!! I’ve played a few different disc golf games in VR and they don’t come close to this one. I’ve been playing disc golf valley for a few years now on mobile so seeing this made me so happy! Lots of fun and so much potential!

developer_response.body: We're very glad you enjoy it! :)

reviews.review_description:
This game is awesome. However with the big black grid pattern on the right hand corner of the picture and the corresponding blurry super zoomed in boxes in the middle make this game completely unplayable. If I close my right eye the picture looks completely normal. I hope to see this issue fixed ASAP!

Update: boxed have been fixed. Best Disc Golf VR game on the market right now.

This is a great little disc golf game with surprisingly awesome physics and responsive controls. The graphics are crisp and the game flows very naturally. Free as well with optional additional courses as dlc. Fairly priced and you can play with a friend in multi-player. Would like custom avatars or meta avatars for more personalized experience.

I played off the chains and disc golf courses in rec room. But this one is the best. If you've played the mobile game you know what to expect when it comes to looks, but the feel was way better than I expected. It's fun to throw. I can't wait for more discs to unlock and more courses. A driving range to hang out with randoms and practice would be pretty cool.

reviews.review_title: The GOAT Disc Golf Game now for VR
reviews.review_description:
I don't usually write reviews but for this one I have to. Disc Golf is my passion, I play it weekly in real life and I've been drooling for a VR disc golf game but no game out there, has scratched my itch, until now.

Not only is this game FREE, but it's also multiplayer using the standard Meta Horizon characters (which tbh, is fine).

I'm giving it 5 stars, it's not perfect and it's got some weird glitches and bugs that I'm sure the developers will iron out and improve over time. It's the best disc golf game for VR right now, and I warmly recommend you to give it a go!

There is an option to purchase more content from within the game, and it adds some new maps and discs that you can unlock but it's optional.

Try it! It's fun, especially with some random online people!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words Whacky! We suspected a few glitches would find its way through on launch but we're working on fixing those as soon as possible :)

reviews.review_description: I have been playing Disc Golf Valley VR on Steam for years, but it recently quit working for me, constantly freezing up. I don't think it was your issue, but it really bummed me out. I don't know much, but I'm looking forward to playing a standalone version on the Quest. So far, I am very much enjoying playing, except I miss the putting practice and the throwing practice. I also noticed that the sounds have been changed and sound more plasticky. As well as the disc physics don't seem to be as fast, and the ground is a lot stickier.

reviews.review_title: Great game, not great disc selection.
reviews.review_description: Great game, I play DGV on my phone as well. Would be cool to be able to purchase better discs. It’s very difficult to unlock good discs.

Throwing feels good and seems to match what you would expect from the movement you do.

However there are bugs. When playing multiplayer the game seems to kick my friend if it's set to private. Then if we do a public game it always seems to break before the round ends.

Sometimes your throw doesn't seem to register and you have to throw it again.

You can snap turn only, however if you pull your trigger which makes the disc appear in hand then you can't turn anymore as left right cycles through discs. This means if mistakenly pull the trigger when not facing the basket you have to physically turn in your room which can result in you swinging hard into something in the real world.

If you purchase the add-on which I did before trying the multi player and having it crash every time then scrolling down doesn't seem to work on the map select so the latter maps are hard or impossible to select.

All in all it has promise but is another example of developers releasing something way too early and unfinished. I understand the need for income but really don't understand why they don't spend a bit more time to make their games a good experience from the start. VR is a fragile market and bad experience matter so much more in VR. The VR community is just fatigued with this sort of failure and that's why it's dying.

If they polish this game I'll up my score they seem to be fixing things but they shouldn't be broke in the first place.

HUGE fan of the mobile app, was so excited with the VR launch. This is going to be a great game, but it is not yet. Worked through a whole variety of bugs and finally earned a few discs in the bag. Sadly the game went a bit berserk and I had to restart. Lost almost all progress across multiple sessions. 

The throwing mechanic on backhand is wonderful. For the life of me I can't figure out the forehand or putting from any distance. I believe I will eventually figure this out...but the mechanics here are just not as natural as the backhand toss.

Will be excited continued development and new courses. Congratulations on the launch!

So happy to see my favorite mobile game in VR. Much better than other quest disc golf VR options. It would be awesome to eventually link my accounts to have all my mobile discs and to have the random join multiplayer. Add me if you are trying to play a game of multiplayer. Also I ran into a glitch on challenge the valley a few times where I couldn’t get the disc to spawn and it was showing the controls for disc selection on both of my hands and I had to restart my rounds. I look forward to seeing this game get updated overtime. Also it would be nice to have all the controls consolidated to one hand so you can play it with just one hand. I’m not sure if that was the issue but a few times it seemed to switch the control to my non-dominant hand which messed me up mid throw

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! Appreciate the heads up about the glitch, we'll have a look. :)

reviews.review_title: By far the best VR disc golf physics
reviews.review_description:
I’ve played this game on SteamVR for years. Though the Quest version isn’t up to par with the SteamVR version, it’s off to a great start. It also has the best disc golf physics in VR, and it’s not even close.

IMPORTANT: The latest update fixed the “black boxes in the right lens” issue, which was the primary cause for low reviews.

I really wanted to love this game. Unfortunately, I find it to be ok, unfinished, and incredibly frustrating.

First of all, this game is best for people who never want to play disc golf in real life. Why do I say that? Well, because the physics of holding a controller and releasing a button to throw doesn’t match actually throwing a disc. In fact, the body mechanics the controller forces your arm into are just subtly different enough that I found my arm more sore after 9 holes of this than 36 holes in the real world. 

There also isn’t any real good feedback for how you are actually holding your disc. Are you on hyzer? Anhyzer? Who knows? And the game doesn’t seem to know, either. I’ve done slow throws to watch the disc, specifically with the controller tilted for anhyzer only to watch the game  treat it as hyzer.

The baskets look like they were modeled for a toddler - way too short.

The disc specs are way too literal. Want to throw a putter off the tee? Nope. That sucker is modeled to only fly 50-70 feet no matter what - which is not how discs work in the real world.

There should be a practice mode that lets you play individual holes.

The app has a better progression system, where you can unlock courses by earning stars. Here it appears that you have to pay for the game and THEN pay for more courses.

There are a TON of bugs. For example, with some of the Lakeside holes, if you land in the water, your lie will literally be in the middle of the water instead of back on land. Discs behave erratically, sometimes skipping off something in the ground and shooting 500 ft into the air or across the play field.  Discs will get stuck in a tree trunk - which getting stuck in a tree might be true to real life, in the game it never considers the disc as touching the ground, so you have no choice but to cancel and restart your round.

Maybe with some work this game will be better. For now, I regret getting it.
Don't  work  see A Black Box With Little Squares On  Right Side All Blurry To ....Still  Don't  Work, Why Can't I Get  A Refund?.... Never Got To Play  Very Disappointed.

developer_response.body: Hey Wombat! Thanks for letting us know, we're currently working on fixing this issue :)

reviews.review_description:
I am giving this one star with the hopes of updating it to five out of five stars if things are changed for the better. The mechanics, maps, and discs are awesome, but here are the main issues that have made it difficult to enjoy the game.

1. When I am playing with a friend, we are only able to play the first part of the map, which is between five and nine holes. 

2. There has been numerous glitches with our discs flying into the air and then randomly going out of bounds

3. The lack of tutorial and ability to enjoy the game with others, to which it would be even more fun if you could do the challenge challenges with someone else.

developer_response.body:
Hey Buckeye!
1. Sunshine Glade is only 5 holes as it has always been in Disc Golf Valley, and all other maps are 9 holes. We don't have 18 hole courses, 9 Holes in DGV is the standard amount :)

2. This issue has been fixed with the latest update!

3. While there is no proper tutorial at this time, you've got controller maps that can be found in the main menu. We're still exploring additional game modes so keep an eye out for any future updates for more ways of challenging your friends!

If you're happy with the latest update, feel free to adjust your rating. :)
Thank you for you feedback!

reviews.review_description:
Downloaded this game yesterday, and a Black grid box + transparent (zoomed) square can be seen in the right lens of the MQ 3. Unplayable at the moment😵‍💫

Still no fix after several weeks??!

Update: The bug is fixed and I can finally throw some O.B!🙌🥲

developer_response.body:
Hi Nyhammertime!
We're happy to let you know that we've now released a fix for this issue, including some other commonly occured glitches. Give it another go to make sure it's resolved for you :)

If you're happy with the latest update, feel free to adjust your rating. :)
Thank you for you feedback!

reviews.review_description: Thanks for the fixes, i think the maps are upside down still,  maybe still have the ability to get stars during multi-player would be cool..mechanics are great.. really fun game

Is it the perfect game no. All games have their bugs and glitches. It's an awesome game though and it feels weird jumping into the maps that I have play on mobile for so long and now you get to be put right in the game. For a free game that just got released for the quest I can't complain. Give it a try it's free what's to lose??

developer_response.body: Thank you PepperKing :) We're happy to report that we fixed a lot of the commonly occured glitches and bugs in the latest update. Glad you're enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description:
This game is awesome in single player mode however……

I find multiplayer to have so many issues we can’t get through a whole round. Are there more patches coming to correct the stability issues?

This game has by far the best physics of any disc golf title. The disc responds very well to speed, wrist motion, nose angle, hyzer/anhyzer, etc. The courses are fun and get much more challenging as you progress. Thank you for finally bringing this to the Quest!

developer_response.body: Very glad you're enjoying our game :)

reviews.review_title: The best disc golf VR experience on Meta
reviews.review_description: Great start to this disc golf VR experience. I hope they continue to update this game and add courses from the mobile app. Also more disc possibilities and weekly tournaments would be a nice touch.

developer_response.body:
Hi Moof!
Thank you for the kind words. We're definitely looking at more ways of adding more challenges and other competitive aspects to the game :)

reviews.review_title: The DGV we know so well, in VR!
reviews.review_description: Multiplayer and all! An immersive virtual reality disc golf valley experience, for sure!

developer_response.body: Happy to hear you're enjoying the game Spike! :)

reviews.review_description: So much fun and very realistic! I find myself playing for hour on end and can’t wait for moire courses to come out!

developer_response.body: We're very happy you're enjoying the game Azapien! :)

reviews.review_description: Off the chains is the only one to play. Disk golf  valley has tons of bugs, bad graphics and only offering a few holes.

developer_response.body:
Hi Maseratimike!
We're sorry to hear that you've encountered bugs and glitches, but hopefully the latest update will fix those issues for you! Included fixes are: No more black box issues for the right eye, no more weird disc sticking on the ground and the disc accidentally flying OB. 
Included in the update is some visual updates for courses as well!

We're still on our initial launch phase on the Meta platform so look out for even more content including courses to be added to game in future updates.

If you're happy with the latest update, feel free to adjust your rating. :)
Thanks for the feedback!

reviews.review_description: This is so far below what I expected it to be

developer_response.body:
Hey Kodiak!
Since we don't know what makes it impossible to play for you specifically, I can happily report that we've released an update that fixes some of the issues and bugs from the previous version that you might be referring to, including: No more Black Box visual issues on the right eye, no more discs randomly flying OB, and no more discs magically unnaturally sticking to the ground.

If you're happy with the latest update and it fixes the issues that you had with it initially, feel free to adjust your rating. :)
Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
I really think the environments are the best so far in a disc golf game. 
  The way you earn disc is awesome. However movement and turning is a hard no in this game. Full movement should be an option, teleporting is not fun personally. But yall have the best concept of how it should be made. 
   I really like the art style yall chose out of all the games in this genre. That's on par.

Amazing game but the only problems are that sometimes the disc will just fly into outer space after it lands, making it go out of bounds and that in the phone version, the disc physics are 1 to 1 like the real thing like sliding. In game, the disc will just stop on a steep slope. I'm hoping these things can be fixed in the future. Otherwise will recommend

developer_response.body:
Hi TayeCraye!
We've got some excellent news for you, both of the issues that you describe has now been fixed in the latest update. Try it out to make sure it resolves it for you. :)
Thanks for the feedback!

reviews.review_title: The best disc golf app ever.
reviews.review_description: The physics of the disc is almost realistic. I have tried many disc golf games, and this is absolutely the best.

Really fun! Am I able to use the account I use on my phone?

Thank you!
With a little work, this could be a great VR Disc golf game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind words Jon!
We've already been hard at work fixing the most common bugs and fixes that you might have encountered, including black box issues, unnaturally sticky discs and accidental OB discs! :)
